arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Eintracht Frankfurt: Live stream, Game time thread, How to watch
arts.sum: A look at the injury situations for both Bayern Munich and Eintracht Frankfurt. Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany.

arts.ttl: BFW Question of the Day — February 22nd: What will the final score be for Bayern Munich vs. Eintracht Frankfurt?
arts.sum: What about a preview of Bayern Munich’s Bundesliga showdown with Eintracht Frankfurt? Bayern Munich is banged up, a little bit out form, and hosting a very dangerous Eintracht Frankfurt squad in a key Bundesliga match-up.

arts.ttl: Predicted Eintracht Frankfurt XI v Bayern Munich: Can Uzun to retain starting place
arts.sum: Eintracht Frankfurt come into their Bundesliga clash against Bayern Munich on a seven game unbeaten run, their longest under Dino Toppmöller, but the head coach has some big decisions to…

arts.ttl: Predicted Bayern Munich XI v Eintracht Frankfurt: Who replaces Harry Kane?
arts.sum: Vincent Kompany has a big decision to make regarding Harry Kane's fitness for Bayern Munich's Bundesliga game against Eintracht Frankfurt.

arts.ttl: “Anyone who looks on indifferently is surrendering democracy” — Bayern Munich president Herbert Hainer’s appeal ahead of German elections
arts.sum: We must stand united against divisive forces that undermine democracy,” Hainer said as part of Bayern’s efforts to support a campaign of Munich Lord Mayor Dieter Reiter, entitled Get out and vote for democracy and human rights . Germany is holding its federal elections on the 23rd of February and Bayern Munich president Herbert Hainer is making clear where the club stands — as detailed in an article published on the club’s website this month.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Bayern Munich to make shock move for Liverpool’s Virgil van Dijk; Manchester United pitching swap of Marcus Rashford for Aleksandar Pavlović; Mason Greenwood on Bayern’s radar?; FC Barcelona talks stalled w/ Frenkie de Jong?; and MORE!
arts.sum: Is Bayern Munich prepared to make a big move by acquiring Liverpool FC center-back Virgil van Dijk this summer on a free transfer: GMS sources have been told that Barcelona are not the only side considering a summer swoop for Greenwood as Paris Saint-Germain and Bayern Munich, who are leading the way in Ligue 1 and the Bundesliga respectively, are showing interest and giving Manchester United further hope of pocketing some extra cash before next term.

arts.ttl: Sunday's Bundesliga predictions including Bayern Munich vs. Eintracht Frankfurt
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Bundesliga fixtures, including Bayern Munich vs. Eintracht Frankfurt.

arts.ttl: Jonas Urbig enjoying Bayern Munich and all it has to offer
arts.sum: Is Jonas Urbig the next great goalkeeper for Bayern Munich? It is safe to say that Bayern Munich goalkeeper Jonas Urbig is enjoying his time in Bavaria so far.

arts.ttl: Eintracht Frankfurt boss Dino Toppmöller knows his team will have to “suffer” at points vs. Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Former Bayern Munich assistant coach and current Eintracht Frankfurt boss Dino Toppmöller knows how difficult playing at the Allianz Arena can be for the opposition. Toppmöller had a good (and successful) game plan the first time around.

arts.ttl: “I feel sorry for him” — Lothar Matthäus pities Bayern Munich’s Thomas Müller after “humiliating” Champions League substitution
arts.sum: Bayern Munich veteran Thomas Müller made the field as his team’s final substitute in a 1-1 Champions League draw with Celtic on Tuesday — a token appearance in the game’s dying seconds as the Bavarians, who had just scored via Alphonso Davies (90+4’), looked set to secure their advance. Looking for more thoughts and analysis of Bayern Munich’s dicey 1-1 draw with Celtic FC in the Champions League?
